sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Kiphat sakna’n kum sawt ka bei sak
Kei aading kithat Topa don lo,

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Man piak loh hehpihna a lian leh
Ka kha van gik tu in suak ta hi

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: in ka mawh lam phawk sak,
Bang ka hi ka phawk ciang ka ling a
A mawh ka kha thum in,

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Tu’n Jesuh a vekpi’n ka pia khin,
Tu’n a sia sa kha in la ka sa

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Aw, mitung dong hong puak suk thupha
Aw, a khauh kizopna lei hong
